title: SMS Add-on
subtitle: Send appointment and patient SMS through your clinic's SMS package.

addon.contactSales: SMS sending is an optional paid add-on. Contact your platform administrator to activate it for this clinic.

quota.title: Monthly usage ({{period}})
quota.exhausted: Monthly quota is exhausted — SMS sending is blocked until next month.

providers.title: Provider settings
providers.subtitle: Turkish numbers are routed to the Turkey provider, European numbers to the Europe provider. Other regions are not supported.
providers.notConfigured: No provider configured — sending to this region will fail
providers.senderNameHint: Alphanumeric sender ID shown to recipients, if supported by the provider.

history.title: SMS history
history.subtitle: Recent SMS sends including blocked and failed attempts.
